plan_metadata.name: group fill in azure key env

parameters.sample:
=== Generated Script ===
Language: bash

```bash
FILE_PATH="/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/vscuse_app_yWeFk/env/.env.local.user"

# Verify file exists before proceeding
if [ ! -f "$FILE_PATH" ]; then
    echo "Error: File does not exist at $FILE_PATH"
    exit 1
fi

# Fill in the value for SECRET_AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY
VALUE="SECRET_AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY=${{secret:AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY:}}"
grep -qxF "$VALUE" "$FILE_PATH" || echo "$VALUE" >> "$FILE_PATH"

if grep -q "$VALUE" "$FILE_PATH"; then
    echo "Successfully updated the file."
else
    echo "Failed to update the file."
    exit 1
fi
```

=== Execution Results ===
Exit Code: 0

=== STDOUT ===
Successfully updated the file.

✓ Script executed successfully

=== Generated Script ===
Language: bash

```bash
#!/bin/bash

# File to modify
ENV_FILE="/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/vscuse_app_yWeFk/env/.env.dev.user"

# Check if file exists
if [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ]; then
    cat > "$ENV_FILE" <<EOL
SECRET_AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY=${{secret:AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY:}}
AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT=https://aoai-jasozdr.openai.azure.com/
AZURE_OPENAI_DEPLOYMENT_NAME=azure/gpt-4.1
EOL
    echo "Environment file updated successfully."
else
    echo "Error: File $ENV_FILE does not exist."
    exit 1
fi
```

=== Execution Results ===

Environment file updated successfully.

#!/bin/bash

# File path

if [ -f "$FILE_PATH" ]; then
    echo "Filling environment file: $FILE_PATH"
    cat <<EOL > "$FILE_PATH"

AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT=https://aoai-jasozdr.openai.azure.com/
AZURE_OPENAI_DEPLOYMENT_NAME=azure/gpt-4.1
EOL
    echo "Environment file successfully updated."
else
    echo "Error: File '$FILE_PATH' does not exist."
    exit 1
fi
